name: Crypto Tracker
description: Track your favorite cryptocurrencies with real-time price updates and customizable alerts.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src * data:; connect-src https://api.coingecko.com https://api.alternative.me
